---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new cloud layer, domain, governance pattern, or CI improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or motivation

Is this feature request related to a problem? Describe what you are trying to achieve.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Domain / layer context

- Cloud(s) affected: [ ] AWS  [ ] Azure  [ ] GCP  [ ] All
- Layer(s) affected (e.g. `data_platform/dbx_governance`, `security/iam`):
- Does this require changes to domain JSON (infra/grants)? [ ] Yes  [ ] No
- Does this require a new Terraform module under `infra/`? [ ] Yes  [ ] No

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Links to relevant Databricks documentation, Terraform provider docs, or prior art.
